summary: you are the last of your empyrean court, a refugee on the Xianzhou Luofu after your homeworld was ravaged by the Denizens of Abundance. As you recover, your friends—Jing Yuan, Dan Feng, and Yingxing of the High-Cloud Quintet—shield you from political intrigue, but your unique bloodline draws dangerous attention from Preceptors and nobles seeking a suitor for their own gain.
